name: Depth Anything V2
author: Guillaume
description: Converts an image to a textured 3D mesh via Depth Anything V2 depth estimation and orthographic back-projection.

params_schema.label: Model Variant
params_schema.tooltip: Larger variants produce sharper depth maps at the cost of speed and VRAM.

params_schema.label: Device
params_schema.tooltip: Select compute device. Auto-detect uses GPU when available.

params_schema.label: Depth Scale
params_schema.tooltip: Controls how much the foreground pops out toward the viewer. Higher = more pronounced 3D relief.

params_schema.label: Focal Length (px)
params_schema.tooltip: Controls the horizontal/vertical spread of the mesh. Higher = narrower (more zoomed in).

params_schema.label: Smooth Depth
params_schema.tooltip: Applies a box blur to the depth map before meshing. Reduces noise and jagged edges.

params_schema.label: Max Faces
params_schema.tooltip: Target face count. Higher = more detail but slower export. Set to -1 to disable limit.
